texto: It is true that often she doesn't want advice; she wants a listening ear. At the same time, however, the wise wife will realize her husband's desire to help and advise is strong. She should refrain from getting angry and humor him a bit, as one wife did by saying, "Thanks for the input. I know I am not the brightest bulb on the tree when it comes to certain things. I am glad we have each other.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Emerson Eggerichs sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “It is true that often she doesn't want advice; she wants a listening ear. At the same time, howev…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, christian-living, masochism, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e masochism.
